Package org.example.service

Class AuthenticationAttemptResult

java.lang.Object
org.example.service.AuthenticationAttemptResult
public final class AuthenticationAttemptResult extends Object
Represents the outcome of one authentication attempt.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

  • Method Details

    • success

      public static AuthenticationAttemptResult success()
      Creates a successful result without user details.
      Returns:
      result produced by this method

    • success

      public static AuthenticationAttemptResult success(String email, UserRole role)
      Creates a successful result with authenticated email and role.
      Parameters:
      email - email address used for login or matching
      role - role value used for access control
      Returns:
      result produced by this method

    • success

      public static AuthenticationAttemptResult success(SystemUser user)
      Creates a successful result from a user object.
      Parameters:
      user - user involved in this action
      Returns:
      result produced by this method

    • failure

      public static AuthenticationAttemptResult failure(LoginStatus status, int attemptsRemaining)
      Creates a failed result with remaining attempts.
      Parameters:
      status - status value used for this operation
      attemptsRemaining - value for attempts remaining
      Returns:
      result produced by this method

    • locked

      public static AuthenticationAttemptResult locked(long remainingLockSeconds)
      Creates a locked result with remaining lock seconds.
      Parameters:
      remainingLockSeconds - value for remaining lock seconds
      Returns:
      result produced by this method

      public LoginStatus getStatus()
      Returns the status.
      Returns:
      status that explains the operation result

      public boolean isSuccess()
      Checks whether success is true.
      Returns:
      true when the action is valid or successful, otherwise false

      Checks whether locked is true.
      Returns:
      true when the action is valid or successful, otherwise false

      Returns the remaining lock seconds.

      Returns the attempts remaining.
